text:
APR Identifiers 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 1: State-specific Medicaid provider ID 
2: NPI 
3: Medicare ID 
4: NCPDP ID 
5: Federal tax ID 
6: State tax ID 
7: SSN 
8: Other 
9: Old state provider ID 

COMMENT: The name of the entity that assigned the PRVDR_NUM is called PRVDR_NUM_ISSG_ENT_ID.
